nasb.text: Now these are the nations which the Lord left, to test Israel by them (that is, all who had not experienced any of the wars of Canaan;

esv.text: Now these are the nations that the Lord left, to test Israel by them, that is, all in Israel who had not experienced all the wars in Canaan.

cnv.text: 這些國的人是耶和華留下的，為要藉著他們來試驗以色列人，就是所有沒有經驗過迦南任何戰爭的人；
